name: aadc-audit-mcp
description: Local stdio MCP server (and CLI) that audits a software project against the UK ICO Age Appropriate Design Code (the Children's Code). Runs entirely on the user's machine; no source code leaves the device.
author: Paul Sellars (PSDigital)

scripts.test: npm run build && npm run build:test && node --test dist-test/tests/hardcoded-url.test.js dist-test/tests/volume-cap.test.js dist-test/tests/launchurl.test.js dist-test/tests/permissions.test.js dist-test/tests/sdks.test.js dist-test/tests/reading-grade.test.js dist-test/tests/policy-mentions-sdks.test.js dist-test/tests/sentry-hygiene.test.js dist-test/tests/network-isolation.test.js dist-test/tests/link-reachability.test.js dist-test/tests/defaults.test.js dist-test/tests/placeholders.test.js dist-test/tests/applicability-contract.test.js dist-test/tests/renderers.test.js dist-test/tests/web-source.test.js dist-test/tests/parent-gate.test.js dist-test/tests/parent-gate-routes.test.js && node tests/run.mjs
